en: Country roads, take me home to the place I belong, West Virginia
ko: Country roads, take me home to the place I belong, West Virginia

en: Mountain mama, take me home, country roads
ko: Mountain mama, take me home, country roads

en: If I should stay, I know you'll be mine
ko: If I should stay, I know you'll be mine

en: So I'll go, dark and dusty, yet I know, painted on the sky
ko: So I'll go, dark and dusty, yet I know, painted on the sky

en: As the taste of moonshine, teardrops in my eyes
ko: As the taste of moonshine, teardrops in my eyes
